task_completion.description: Verify that a DICOM image is loaded and visible in the Weasis application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Weasis GUI is open and displaying a medical image (CT/X-Ray) in the main viewing area.

task_completion.description: Verify that a sharpening spatial filter is applied to the image in Weasis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Weasis UI shows the spatial filter tools or menu being accessed, with 'Sharpen' (or a similar sharpening filter) selected, or the image visibly updates to appear sharper with filter settings visible on screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the export dialog is opened and configured to save a TIFF file to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog in Weasis is visible, showing the output format set to TIFF and the destination path set to or navigating towards ~/DICOM/exports/sharpened_ct.tiff.

task_completion.description: Verify that the sharpened_ct.tiff file was successfully created in the expected directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal window or file manager shows the file 'sharpened_ct.tiff' exists in the '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify that the filter_applied.txt file was created with the correct keyword.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal window (e.g., using echo, cat, or nano) or a text editor shows the creation or contents of '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/filter_applied.txt' containing the word 'sharpen'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Weasis GUI to apply the filter and export the image, rather than bypassing the UI with command-line image processing tools (like ImageMagick).
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show active interaction with the Weasis application menus, filter settings, and export dialogs.

integrity.description: Ensure the text file was genuinely created using a terminal or text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Visible terminal commands (like echo 'sharpen' > ...) or a text editor interface saving the file, rather than just a terminal printing the expected output without saving.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not simply print a fake success message to the terminal to simulate completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory must show the actual steps of interacting with Weasis and creating the files, not just a final terminal screen claiming the task is done.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected export path for the TIFF image is exactly '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/sharpened_ct.tiff'. The expected note path is '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/filter_applied.txt' and it must contain the exact keyword 'sharpen'.
